programs.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programs.desc: . From natural landscapes to historic architecture representing centuries of cultural development, Japan's World Heritage sites offer a wide range of glimpses into history and the beauty of nature.

programs.title: Japan from Above: Up Close
programs.desc: . This program takes you on an aerial journey across 21st century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programs.title: Science View
programs.desc: . Squid and cuttlefish use camouflage not just to hide but to communicate. Vanguard Researchers explores the mechanism behind plant immunity. Tomoko Tashiro, Naoko Yamazaki, Michelle Yamamoto, Yoichi Sato, Tomoko Tina Kimura, Rena Yamada, Ross Mihara, Rachel Walzer.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Cycle Around Japan
programs.desc: , Episode 2, Season 1. A series showcasing the stunning landscapes featured in Cycle Around Japan. This time: the beautiful islands of Yamaguchi, and the historical scenery of the Izumo Highway. Zac Reynolds.

programs.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programs.desc: . The historic city of Kyoto faces threats of landslides and post-earthquake fires. What modern systems defend this ancient city from natural disasters.
